THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCANN, NORMA D THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 EDDY ST. #328, S.F, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL MAY-19-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE & SHERIFF MAY POST. IF DEFT VACATES AS AGREED, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT & DISMISS WITH/PREJ.
